verdict.summary: Guide is broadly useful for daily-life orientation, but it contains several factual overclaims about gym chains and a clear incorrect attribution of Ericeira World Surfing Reserve to UNESCO.

issues.current: 🏄 Ericeira — UNESCO World Surfing Reserve. Ribeira d'Ilhas, Coxos
issues.problem: Ericeira is a World Surfing Reserve, but not a UNESCO designation. World Surfing Reserves are a programme of Save The Waves Coalition / World Surfing Reserves, not UNESCO.
issues.suggestion: Write: "🏄 Ericeira — World Surfing Reserve, признанная программой Save The Waves / World Surfing Reserves; Ribeira d'Ilhas, Coxos".
issues.source: World Surfing Reserves / Save The Waves Coalition

issues.problem: The source title incorrectly labels the Ericeira reserve as UNESCO. The URL itself is not a UNESCO page.
issues.suggestion: Change the title to "Ericeira World Surfing Reserve" or "World Surfing Reserves — Ericeira" and remove "UNESCO".
issues.source: World Surfing Reserves / Save The Waves Coalition

issues.problem: The claim that PHIVE has 40+ clubs appears wrong. PHIVE is a much smaller Portuguese chain; 40+ clubs is more consistent with larger chains such as Solinca, not PHIVE.
issues.suggestion: Replace with a safer formulation: "35–50€/мес ориентировочно; сеть среднего сегмента, клубов существенно меньше, чем у Fitness Hut/Solinca — проверяйте актуальный список на сайте PHIVE."

issues.current: 24,99–34,99€/мес в 2026 (Fit Lite / Fit Premium). ... 80+ клубов по PT.
issues.problem: The number of Fitness Hut clubs in Portugal is likely overstated. Public Fitness Hut/VivaGym group materials usually refer to dozens of clubs in Portugal, not 80+ Fitness Hut clubs in Portugal alone. Also the monthly price is misleading without noting that many advertised prices are shown per 2 weeks and may exclude joining/maintenance/insurance fees.
issues.suggestion: Write: "цены часто рекламируются за 2 недели; в пересчёте на месяц и с учётом регистрационных/административных сборов итог отличается. Сеть крупная, десятки клубов по Португалии — актуальное число и цены проверяйте на сайте Fitness Hut."
issues.source: Fitness Hut official club finder and pricing pages

issues.problem: The price range is probably too low as a general 2026 monthly estimate. VivaGym/Fitness Hut-style gyms often advertise low fortnightly prices and then add registration, maintenance or insurance fees; monthly totals can be higher than 19–25€.
issues.suggestion: Use a caveated range: "часто от ~20–40€/мес в зависимости от клуба/плана/акций; смотрите, указана ли цена за 2 недели и есть ли taxas de inscrição/manutenção/seguro."

issues.current: 40-60€/мес. Ближе к премиум, сети часто при отелях.
issues.problem: The description "часто при отелях" is misleading for Solinca as a general chain description. Solinca clubs are commonly located in shopping centres, business/urban locations and standalone fitness spaces; it is not primarily a hotel-gym network.
issues.suggestion: Write: "40–60€/мес ориентировочно; крупная сеть среднего/верхнего сегмента, много клубов в городах и ТЦ; бассейн/сауна зависят от конкретного клуба."

issues.current: Câmara Municipal (муниципалитет) в каждом муниципалитете. 15-30€/мес. Для резидентов с atestado.
issues.problem: Too categorical. Not every municipality has a municipal gym with the same access model; many have municipal swimming pools or sports complexes instead. Atestado de residência is not universally required; requirements vary by município and facility.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Во многих municípios есть муниципальные бассейны/спорткомплексы; цены и доступ зависят от Câmara Municipal. Могут попросить proof of address/NIF/residency, но atestado требуется не везде."
issues.source: Municipal sports facility rules vary by Câmara Municipal

issues.problem: Avenida Marginal is primarily a road; it is not a continuous dedicated running promenade all the way from Lisbon to Cascais. For runners, the more accurate reference is the seaside promenade sections, especially Cascais–Estoril–São João do Estoril/Carcavelos, plus specific riverside routes in Lisbon.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Paredão Cascais–Estoril–São João/Carcavelos и отдельные участки вдоль Marginal; в Лиссабоне — набережная Belém–Cais do Sodré/Parque das Nações."

issues.current: Trail: Marão, Estrela, Sintra — много trail-rac
issues.suggestion: Change to "много trail-races / трейловых забегов" or Russian-only "много трейловых забегов".

issues.current: ⚽ Футбол — community leagues, 3-5 на 3-5, любые возраст
issues.problem: The wording is confusing and grammatically wrong. In Portugal casual football is usually 5-a-side/7-a-side/futsal; "3-5 на 3-5" is not a standard description.
issues.suggestion: Write: "⚽ Футбол/футзал — casual games, 5x5 или 7x7, community leagues и WhatsApp/Meetup-группы; возраст и уровень зависят от группы."

issues.current: Only IPDJ, Ericeira reserve and Federação Portuguesa de Surf are listed.
issues.problem: The guide gives many specific 2026 prices and club-count claims for commercial gym chains but does not cite the official pricing/club pages of those chains. For fast-changing prices this makes the guide fragile.
issues.suggestion: Add official sources for Fitness Hut, Holmes Place Portugal, PHIVE, Solinca, VivaGym and municipal sport facilities where prices are quoted; or clearly mark prices as indicative and promo-dependent.
issues.source: Official websites of the named gym chains

missing_topics: Gym contracts often include loyalty periods, joining fees, annual maintenance fees, insurance fees and cancellation notice periods; advertised prices may be per 2 weeks rather than per calendar month.
Many gyms require IBAN/direct debit and sometimes a Portuguese NIF; newcomers without Portuguese bank accounts should check accepted payment methods.
Outdoor swimming/surfing safety: beach flag system, lifeguard season, currents, and not entering Nazaré/other big-wave spots without expert guidance.
Municipal pools may require advance booking, swim caps, specific opening hours, local-resident pricing and sometimes health/fitness declarations depending on the municipality.
Apps/platforms commonly used for padel/football bookings in Portugal, e.g. Playtomic or local club booking systems.
